name: BLACK SOLID ROUND-NECK T-SHIRT — PE-001
description:
Prince Esquire black solid round-neck essential tee — breathable cotton jersey designed as a versatile everyday staple.

Key features:
• Black cotton-blend jersey with soft breathable hand-feel.
• Classic ribbed round-neck (crew neck) collar.
• Short sleeves with reinforced double-stitched hems.
• Clean minimalist design — easy to layer or wear solo.
• Comfortable regular-to-relaxed fit through body.
• Suitable for casual, streetwear, and weekend wear.

Fit & styling: Pair with denim, chinos, joggers, or shorts depending on the occasion. Tuck or leave untucked for a clean casual look.

Care: Machine wash cold, tumble dry low. Iron on low heat if needed.

Available sizes M–3XL. Exclusively at Prince Esquire.
